issue_title: fix: fix loading spinner on desktop / mobile builds.
issue_body_preview:
Temporary fix for #517 by changing the location of tauri's webview to https://roomy.space. Long-term the bug(s) appears to also affect static builds of roomy run with `vite preview`, debugging this has been difficult as it does not produce any console errors.

Tested [and working]
 - [x] .deb lin
test_description_zh: 在桌面端（Tauri）和移动端构建版本中打开应用，观察初始加载过程是否能正常完成，页面是否能正常显示主界面内容。
expected_result_zh: 应用启动后加载动画（spinner）应在合理时间内消失，主界面内容正常渲染显示，不会一直停留在加载中状态。
